entries.title: Passkey authentication
entries.description: Sign in with biometrics or hardware security keys. Register and manage passkeys from the Security tab in Settings.

entries.title: App detail page with code snippets
entries.description: View credentials, copy integration snippets for client SDK, auth routes, and publish endpoints — all scoped to your app key.

entries.title: Webhook management per application
entries.description: Configure webhook endpoints on each app to receive channel lifecycle events (occupied, vacated, member changes).

entries.title: Dark and light mode
entries.description: Theme toggle in the user menu cycles between dark, light, and system preference.

entries.title: Real password change flow
entries.description: The Security settings tab now has a working password change form instead of a placeholder.

entries.title: Pro plan capped at 10 applications
entries.description: The Pro tier now allows up to 10 applications instead of unlimited, aligning with sustainable platform limits.

entries.title: Stripe billing integration
entries.description: Full checkout flow for Pro plan upgrades, webhook-driven subscription persistence, and Stripe Customer Portal access from Settings.

entries.title: Better Auth with email and password
entries.description: Replaced hardcoded demo credentials with real authentication. Separate login and signup pages with first/last name collection and password confirmation.

entries.title: Neon Postgres database
entries.description: Production database provisioned via Vercel Marketplace. Prisma schema covers users, sessions, apps, channel policies, subscriptions, and webhooks.

entries.title: Applications CRUD
entries.description: Create, list, and delete realtime applications. Each app gets a unique key and secret for SDK integration.

entries.title: Channel policies
entries.description: Define pattern-based rules for channel types (public, private, presence, encrypted) scoped to each application.

entries.title: Active channels monitor
entries.description: Live polling view of channel traffic across your applications, refreshing every 10 seconds.

entries.title: Settings with profile, security, and billing tabs
entries.description: Edit your name, manage passkeys, change password, view subscription status, and access Stripe portal — all in one place.

entries.title: Marketing site launch
entries.description: Landing page, pricing, documentation with 10+ pages covering quickstart, architecture, channels, auth, encryption, deployment guides, and API reference.

entries.title: Client SDK documentation
entries.description: Full API reference for @summoniq/summon-flow including constructor options, channel methods, connection events, and presence.

entries.title: Open source repository
entries.description: Monorepo published to GitHub with MIT license. Includes client SDK, console app, and marketing site.
